content_body:
December 2021 ~ Thank you for the amazing vacation getaway in your beautiful cabin in Blue Ridge! We had so much fun! We enjoyed the restaurants in town ~ the shops in Downtown Blue Ridge are one of our favorite places to visit. Fudge and milk shakes from Three Sister Fudge ia always amazing!

Beautiful cabin and furnishings ~ lots of great memories. 

Thanks again! Can't wait to return in the summer ~ North Florida
title: Amazing Getaway
